topics: Structure and composition of atmosphere; elements of weather and climate
Seasons of India: mechanisms, onset, withdrawal, monsoons as a unifying bond
Climate change: causes, impacts on agriculture and water resources
Floods: types, causes, and management strategies
subtopics: Atmospheric layers (Troposphere to Exosphere)
Temperature distribution patterns in India
Monsoon mechanisms: ITCZ shift, jet streams, El Niño/La Niña effects
Disaster management frameworks for flood-prone regions

chapters.source_chapter_name: Early Humans and Beginning of Civilisation (9 Hours)
topics: Evolution of humans: from 2 million years ago to modern Homo sapiens
Prehistoric periodization: Palaeolithic, Mesolithic, Neolithic ages and tools
Transition to food production: domestication of plants and animals (Neolithic Revolution)
Harappan civilization: urban planning, trade, and social structure
subtopics: Hunter-gatherer societies and stone tool technologies
Mesolithic adaptations in the Indian subcontinent
Comparative analysis of Harappan sites (Mohenjo-daro, Harappa)
Contemporary civilizations: Mesopotamia, Egypt, China
key_concepts: Cultural continuity and change across millennia

chapters.source_chapter_name: State and Society geography; texts; rituals; political institutions, and social order (upto 1000 CE) (9 Hours)
topics: Vedic polity: Sabha, Samiti, and the evolution of state structures
Administrative systems in early empires (Mauryas, Guptas): centralization vs decentralization
Quest for knowledge: educational institutions (Gurukuls, Taxila), texts, and rituals
subtopics: Social stratification: Varna system evolution
Role of Brahmins in political administration
Transmission of knowledge through oral and written traditions
Rituals as social cohesion mechanisms
key_concepts: Interplay between religion, state, and society
Knowledge systems: Vedic to Buddhist/Jain traditions

topics: Concept of democracy: meaning, features, and types (direct vs representative)
Roots of Indian democracy: colonial resistance, freedom struggle, and constitutional values
Challenges to democracy in India: inequality, communalism, regional disparities
subtopics: Democratic principles: liberty, equality, justice, fraternity
Historical context: 1947 Constitution drafting process
Contemporary challenges: electoral malpractices, corruption, and social divisions
Role of civil society in strengthening democracy
key_concepts: Democracy as a way of life vs political system
Inclusivity and representation in Indian polity

topics: Importance of elections: legitimacy, accountability, and citizen participation
Electoral systems in India: First-past-the-post vs proportional representation debates
Institutional framework: Delimitation Commission and Election Commission powers
subtopics: Voter turnout trends and demographic shifts
Election machinery: EVMs, voter ID systems, and logistics
Delimitation criteria: population changes vs geographical boundaries
Electoral reforms: Model Code of Conduct enforcement
key_concepts: Free and fair elections as democratic pillars

topics: Scarcity of resources: fundamental economic problem and choice-making
Opportunity cost: trade-offs in production and consumption decisions
subtopics: Factors of production: land, labor, capital, entrepreneurship
Production Possibility Frontier (PPF) analysis
Resource allocation mechanisms: market vs command economies
Opportunity cost calculation examples
key_concepts: Efficiency and equity in resource distribution

chapters.source_chapter_name: The Price Puzzle: What Drives the Market (8 Hours)
topics: Laws of demand and supply: determinants, shifts vs movements along curves
subtopics: Price elasticity concepts (demand/supply)
Market equilibrium determination mechanisms
External factors affecting price levels (taxes, subsidies, weather)
Real-world case studies of market fluctuations
key_concepts: Market failures and government intervention needs

topics: Ocean relief features: continental shelves, slopes, abyssal plains
subtopics: Waves: generation mechanisms and coastal impacts
Tides: spring vs neap tides; tidal energy potential
Currents: warm/cold currents and their climatic effects
Oceanic biodiversity hotspots

topics: Biomes: global distribution patterns and ecological characteristics
subtopics: Major biomes: tropical rainforests, deserts, tundras, grasslands
Biosphere reserves in India: purpose, locations, conservation goals
Human impact on biome integrity (deforestation, urbanization)
Climate change effects on biome shifts
key_concepts: Interdependence of biotic and abiotic factors
